sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الْمُعَلِّمَةُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ الْبَحْثَ عَنْ مَعْلُومَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica je zamolila učenike da potražite informacije.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students to search for information.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ هَاتِفَهُ وَبَدَأَ يَبْحَثُ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je otvorio telefon i počeo pretraživati.
sentences.translationEn: Each student opened their phone and started searching.

sentences.translation: Neki su zapisali informacije u bilježnice.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them wrote the information in their notebooks.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمُوا مَا وَجَدُوهُ لِلْمُعَلِّمَةِ بَعْدَ خَمْسِ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Prezentovali su ono što su pronašli nastavnici nakon pet minuta.
sentences.translationEn: They presented what they found to the teacher after five minutes.
